---
title: "to do to UI"
format: html
---

## implement these functions

- [ ] button to copy/paste the output
- [ ] button to download the output as a file
- [ ] i dont understand what text and vision models do differently?
- [ ] be able to add multiple patients
  - [ ] but maybe not?
- [ ] **upload multiple docs at once**
- [ ] Process multiple docs simultaneously for summarization and Q/A
